## Meeting Purpose

[Review performance data and discuss a potential Reddit/Medium program.](https://fathom.video/share/drmYLw99Nyscbtci994MKvf6RMWb28gR?tab=summary&timestamp=103.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Engagement Rate Mystery:** A site-wide engagement rate (ER) drop since early August is under investigation. Jackson will check GA4 tag manager history for a potential tracking change that may have "fixed" an anomaly.](https://fathom.video/share/drmYLw99Nyscbtci994MKvf6RMWb28gR?tab=summary&timestamp=124.0)
  - **Observability Pillar Surges:** The Observability content pillar jumped 19 spots to \#20, validating the content strategy. Overall traffic is up, likely from a recent ebook sponsorship.
  - [**Reddit Program Phased:** GrowthX proposed a two-phase Reddit program: 1) Free monitoring/insights now, then 2) a full management service (\~$8–10k/mo) in Q1 2025.](https://fathom.video/share/drmYLw99Nyscbtci994MKvf6RMWb28gR?tab=summary&timestamp=811.0)
  - [**Galileo to Assess Urgency:** Jackson will discuss the full program's urgency and budget with Connor to decide if Galileo should pursue the paid service sooner.](https://fathom.video/share/drmYLw99Nyscbtci994MKvf6RMWb28gR?tab=summary&timestamp=979.0)

## Topics

### Performance & Analytics Deep Dive

  - [**Engagement Rate (ER) Drop:**](https://fathom.video/share/drmYLw99Nyscbtci994MKvf6RMWb28gR?tab=summary&timestamp=124.0)
      - [A site-wide ER drop has occurred since early August, now hovering just above the 50% industry benchmark.](https://fathom.video/share/drmYLw99Nyscbtci994MKvf6RMWb28gR?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
      - [The drop is concentrated on blog pages, with some showing massive declines (e.g., 20–40%).](https://fathom.video/share/drmYLw99Nyscbtci994MKvf6RMWb28gR?tab=summary&timestamp=171.0)
      - [The homepage ER remains high at 85%.](https://fathom.video/share/drmYLw99Nyscbtci994MKvf6RMWb28gR?tab=summary&timestamp=166.0)
      - [**Hypothesis:** A GA4 tag manager change in late August (to remove duplicate pageviews) may have inadvertently "fixed" a previous tracking anomaly, making the prior high ERs appear inflated.](https://fathom.video/share/drmYLw99Nyscbtci994MKvf6RMWb28gR?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)
      - [**Action:** Jackson will investigate the tag manager history to confirm the timeline and impact.](https://fathom.video/share/drmYLw99Nyscbtci994MKvf6RMWb28gR?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)
  - [**Traffic & Content Performance:**](https://fathom.video/share/drmYLw99Nyscbtci994MKvf6RMWb28gR?tab=summary&timestamp=124.0)
      - [Overall traffic is up, likely driven by a recent ebook sponsorship.](https://fathom.video/share/drmYLw99Nyscbtci994MKvf6RMWb28gR?tab=summary&timestamp=527.0)
      - [**Anomaly:** The "one-page multi-context processing" blog saw a 1,000% session jump (to 75) but a 4% ER, suggesting bot traffic or a keyword mix-up.](https://fathom.video/share/drmYLw99Nyscbtci994MKvf6RMWb28gR?tab=summary&timestamp=422.0)
      - [**Success:** The "AI evaluations" pillar page saw a 200% session jump with a strong 70% ER, validating the pillar strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/drmYLw99Nyscbtci994MKvf6RMWb28gR?tab=summary&timestamp=474.0)
      - [**SEO Metrics:**](https://fathom.video/share/drmYLw99Nyscbtci994MKvf6RMWb28gR?tab=summary&timestamp=584.0)
          - [Non-branded impressions decreased slightly, attributed to Google's bot traffic cleanup.](https://fathom.video/share/drmYLw99Nyscbtci994MKvf6RMWb28gR?tab=summary&timestamp=584.0)
          - The Observability content pillar jumped 19 spots to \#20.
          - [LLM referral traffic is up, near its all-time high.](https://fathom.video/share/drmYLw99Nyscbtci994MKvf6RMWb28gR?tab=summary&timestamp=633.0)
          - [Galileo's citation count increased from 3% to 5%, while competitors' remained flat.](https://fathom.video/share/drmYLw99Nyscbtci994MKvf6RMWb28gR?tab=summary&timestamp=666.0)

### Reddit & Medium Program Proposal

  - [**Context:** GrowthX is piloting a full Reddit management service for other clients and is now scoping a formal offering.](https://fathom.video/share/drmYLw99Nyscbtci994MKvf6RMWb28gR?tab=summary&timestamp=825.0)
  - [**Proposed Phased Approach:**](https://fathom.video/share/drmYLw99Nyscbtci994MKvf6RMWb28gR?tab=summary&timestamp=811.0)
      - [**Phase 1 (Immediate & Free):** GrowthX will monitor relevant subreddits to provide content strategy insights.](https://fathom.video/share/drmYLw99Nyscbtci994MKvf6RMWb28gR?tab=summary&timestamp=811.0)
      - [**Phase 2 (Q1 2025, \~$8–10k/mo):** A full management service, including seeding conversations, replying to comments, and cross-publishing to Medium.](https://fathom.video/share/drmYLw99Nyscbtci994MKvf6RMWb28gR?tab=summary&timestamp=874.0)
  - [**Urgency & Flexibility:**](https://fathom.video/share/drmYLw99Nyscbtci994MKvf6RMWb28gR?tab=summary&timestamp=979.0)
      - [GrowthX can accelerate the full program if Galileo's need is urgent and the budget is approved.](https://fathom.video/share/drmYLw99Nyscbtci994MKvf6RMWb28gR?tab=summary&timestamp=1006.0)
      - [Jackson will discuss the timeline and budget with Connor, noting internal pressure for a Reddit presence.](https://fathom.video/share/drmYLw99Nyscbtci994MKvf6RMWb28gR?tab=summary&timestamp=979.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jackson:** Investigate GA4 tag manager history to find the cause of the ER drop.](https://fathom.video/share/drmYLw99Nyscbtci994MKvf6RMWb28gR?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)
  - [**Jackson:** Discuss the Reddit program's urgency and budget with Connor.](https://fathom.video/share/drmYLw99Nyscbtci994MKvf6RMWb28gR?tab=summary&timestamp=979.0)
  - [**Jackson:** Report back to GrowthX on the decision regarding the paid Reddit service.](https://fathom.video/share/drmYLw99Nyscbtci994MKvf6RMWb28gR?tab=summary&timestamp=1055.0)
